name: Yuuma Mukami
description: **Height:** 190 cm Yuma Mukami is the third son of the Mukami household.

name: Zack Walker
description: Height: 185 cm (6'1") Weight: 76 kg (168 lbs.) Eye color: Blue Hometown: Mousanish District Zack is a genius with an IQ of 200 whose field of expertise is space science. He even has a spaceship pilot's license. He and Quitterie have been friends since they were little due to their parents being coworkers. ~!He ends up marrying Quitterie.!~

name: André Grandier
nativeName: アンドレ・グランディエ
description: The friend of Oscar and the grandson of her nanny, André and Oscar learned the arts of fencing and horsemanship together when they were children. As they grew up, Oscar became the Dauphine's guard and the class gap between them widened. He has been described as a "true working-class hero" by Helen McCarthy. ~!André is secretly in love with Oscar, but he never tells her until both of them decide to help the insurgents when the French Revolution begins. name: Bu Lü
description: Lü Bu, the Flying General was the strongest warrior of The Three Kingdoms. ~!Humanity's vanguard and representative in the first round of Ragnarok.!~

name: Cheval Grand
description: **Height**: 160cm Ambitious with a timid heart. Aiming to become a great Umamusume. She's introverted, withdrawn, and has an inferiority complex about her talented older and younger sisters. She spends her time working hard to hopefully surpass them both one day, and have her own abilities acknowledged. She's not on bad terms with either of her siblings... but they both have a glamorous temperament, which makes her a bit out of place when they're together.

name: Fana
description: __Height:__ 162cm __Species:__ Human ~!A rogue mage from the Diamond Kingdom living with other fugitives in the Clover Kingdom. She is also the former host of the elf Fana, one of the Eye of the Midnight Sun's Third Eye.!~

name: Hanae Ashiya
description: __Height:__ 170 cm __Race:__ Human He is a high school student who is able to see yōkai and a part-time employee of the Mononokean. Hanae has a cheerful, amiable and straightforward personality and can easily sympathise with both human and yōkai. As Hanae can act rather childlike at times, with his naive innocence, impulsiveness and abundance of energy, he is quite often compared to and referred as a five-year-old (mostly by Haruitsuki).

name: Hikari Tsuneki
description: A "modern day meddling princess." She is always cheerful and is the class idol of class 2-B at Teruhi Higashi High School. She was the runner-up of last year's "Miss Santa Contest," and has an exclusive seat on the terrace. She loves to eat, and is occasionally stubborn.

name: Jikka
description: __Race:__ Human __Age:__ Unknown __Tao Attribute:__ Earth __Occupation:__ Asaemon __Affiliation:__ Yamada Clan __Rank:__ 3rd Jikka is the 3rd ranked Asaemon in the Yamada clan. After the shogun sent criminals to Kotaku to find the Elixir of Life, he was tasked with being Hōrubō's executioner. Jikka is a laid-back individual who compared to his fellow clan members, especially Shugen, is less dedicated to his work as an Asaemon. He is rather dishonest and goes as far as to lie to shogun's official

name: Jun Satou
description: A 20-year-old chef who works in the kitchen, Satou is a helpful but intimidating individual. He is in love with Yachiyo, but has problems expressing it. Of course, because she is so devoted to Kyouko, she fails to recognize any hints he attempts to make. He likes to take out his anger on Popura by messing with her or bending the truth, to which Popura naively believes. name: Kana
description: Kana is one of the main protagonists of Leviathan. She is a three-star Harpoonist from the ship Busan Union who becomes the guardian and mentor for the siblings Bo-Ta and Ri-Ta Ma, the children of her idol Te-On Ma.

name: Karin
description: __Height:__ 162.6 cm (II) Karin is a former subordinate of Orochimaru who assisted him in his experimentations and was left in charge of one of his bases while he was away; and was also the only one loyal to Orochimaru to remain even though his current status is questionable. Sasuke Uchiha recruits her as a member of Snake. While Sasuke admits she may be troublesome, he also notes that her special abilities make her useful. She also seems to have a liking for Sasuke, implying to Sasuke that a te

name: Kazehana
description: Height:170cm Weight: 53kg Sekirei No: 03 Three size: B 98 / W 60 / 92 She becomes Minato's fifth Sekirei and her power is wind (derived from her name "kaze" which means wind and "Hana" which means flower). name: Pekora
description: An angel who lost her halo and became stranded on Earth. She is often starved due to not having any money, but is also somewhat defiant in accepting kindness from Yurine as she believes her to be a witch.

name: Ryou Shimazaki
description: He is a powerful esper, member of the now defunct terrorist organization​ Claw and a former part of the Ultimate 5.
